mission.title: fluentd: Large message overflow logic incorrect
mission.description: Large message overflow logic incorrect. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current fluentd deployment
steps.description:
Verify your fluentd version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd
helm list -n fluentd 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working fluentd installation.

steps.title: Review fluentd configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant fluentd configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd
kubectl get configmap -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluentd
```
Check [CONTRIBUTING guideline](https://github.com/fluent/fluentd/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) first and here is the list to help us investigate the problem.

- fluentd or td-agent version.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Large message overflow logic incorrect
steps.description:
In the previous version, if BufferChunkOverflowError occurs,
whole data is not sent because of exception.
It is not appropriate because the problem exists only a partial split
data.

In this commit, detect BufferChunkOverflowError and postpone to raise
it as an exception.
So a valid partial split is processed as intended.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Upgrade fluentd to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade fluentd:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade fluentd fluentd/fluentd --namespace fluentd
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluentd
helm list -n fluentd
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd
kubectl get events -n fluentd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Large message overflow logic incorrect" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
In the previous version, if BufferChunkOverflowError occurs,
whole data is not sent because of exception.
It is not appropriate because the problem exists only a partial split
data.

In this commit, detect BufferChunkOverflowError and postpone to raise
it as an exception.
So a valid partial split is processed as intended.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with fluentd installed or the issue environment reproducible.
